personal.name: Shubham Singh
personal.title: Product Manager
personal.about: Strategic and data-driven Product Manager with over a decade of cross-functional experience in Product Management, enterprise SaaS, and DevOps. Proven track record of scaling B2B platforms—driving engagement growth, significant annual savings, and conversion rate improvements through A/B testing and data-informed decisions.

experience.description: Led the end-to-end transformation of a legacy L&D system into a scalable cloud-native platform serving 250,000+ learners.
achievements: Owned end-to-end product lifecycle for a GenAI-powered L&D chatbot serving 250K+ employees; leveraged a locally hosted Llama 3 8B model with RAG and vector search, resulting in a 28% increase in course completion rates.
Launched a certification platform across 20+ domains, driving 64% YoY certification growth and 32% rise in internal promotions.
Led A/B testing & product experimentation to optimize user flows and chatbot responses, achieving 20% increase in conversion rates and 38% improvement in user feedback scores.
Achieved $650K+ in annual cost savings via automation and streamlined content operations.

experience.description: Managed DevOps implementations and scaled enterprise application support workflows.
achievements: Scaled automated server space reporting to 50+ servers, achieving 100% reporting coverage and eliminating manual effort entirely (~365 hours/year).
Designed and maintained Jenkins/GitHub CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment time by 40% with a 99.5% success rate.
Implemented New Relic and ELK monitoring, maintaining 99.9% uptime and reducing incident response time by 30%.

experience.description: Oversaw DevOps infrastructure, version control, and CI/CD operations for SaaS ecosystems.
achievements: Managed version control and CI/CD workflows for 10+ SaaS applications, achieving 95% on-time delivery.
Ensured 99.8% uptime for services supporting 1,000+ users through proactive maintenance and monitoring.

projects.title: DocExplain AI
projects.description: AI-powered document analysis platform for instant, intelligent insights.

projects.title: Trueworth
projects.description: Track expenses, set goals, and improve financial health with a simple, no-nonsense approach.
